summary: Backend-only SEO testing completed. All 24 tests passed. Verified: index.html has correct 'index, follow' robots meta tag (NOT noindex), static meta title and description in raw HTML, /api/sitemap.xml returns valid XML with all required URLs, /api/prerender/homepage returns full HTML with Organization and FAQ schema, /api/prerender/fabrics and /api/prerender/collections return proper HTML, /api/prerender/check correctly detects Googlebot (is_bot=true) and normal browsers (is_bot=false), robots.txt allows /api/sitemap.xml and /api/prerender/ while blocking /admin/ and /vendor/.

Key endpoints: /api/sitemap.xml (dynamic sitemap from MongoDB), /api/prerender/homepage, /api/prerender/fabrics, /api/prerender/collections (prerendered HTML for bots), /api/prerender/check (bot detection). robots.txt properly configured. index.html has correct 'index, follow' meta tag.
